document_text: The Titanic sank on April 15, 1912 after striking an iceberg. Of the 2,224 passengers and crew aboard, approximately 1,500 perished. The ship was 882 feet long.
question: What happened to the Titanic?
ai_answer: The Titanic sank on April 15, 1912 after hitting an iceberg in the Atlantic. About 1,500 of the 2,500 people on board died. The ship measured 900 feet in length.
explanation: Source says 2,224 passengers/crew (not 2,500) and 882 feet long (not 900).
